evals.prompt: Check whether OpenWord Hybrid is connected on the hybrid bridge, show me the runtime summary, and tell me if the side panel needs focus first.
evals.expected_output: Uses the hybrid bridge URL, checks session health, reports summary/state, and recommends focus-word-pane when relevant.

evals.prompt: Run a live review-heavy smoke pass against comments.docx on the Hybrid Word add-in and save artifacts under a scenario-tagged output folder.
evals.expected_output: Uses wait-and-check on 4018, corpus-aware smoke-test flags, and preserves scenario/fixture-labeled artifacts.

evals.prompt: The OpenWord Hybrid taskpane is visible but not focused. Focus the composer area and then inspect the current document metadata on the live Word session.
evals.expected_output: Uses focus-word-pane with the input target, then runs bridge metadata/state commands against the same live session.
